monthly_reports.summary: During June 2026, a total of 2500 headlines were analyzed across 10 language services. BBC Mundo maintained the most positive outlook (-0.04 avg polarity), while BBC Russian showed the most negative sentiment (-0.25). Overall sentiment improved by 0.04 compared to the previous period.
